title: Vacancy for Teacher at WhiteHat Jr

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at WhiteHat Jr
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
